message:
style(node): refactor control plane test assertions to matches! macro

Replace verbose if-let/match-panic patterns with concise assert!(matches!())
in three control plane modules:

- divergence_gate.rs: DivergenceBlock and UnauthorizedRecovery assertions
- evidence_replay_gate.rs: Diverged verdict assertion with field checks
- key_role_separation.rs: RoleSeparationViolation and KeyRoleMismatch
  assertions

No behavioral changes — same error variant and field checks, more
idiomatic and readable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
